summary: First-iteration smoke test of PayGuard AI. Backend (login, dashboard summary, customers, AI follow-up, auth-ownership) and frontend (landing, login, dashboard with KPIs/charts/INR, customers list, invoices list, followups page, logout) all working. Zero console errors.
passed: POST /api/auth/login with demo@payguard.ai/demo123 returns JWT (188-char token)
GET /api/dashboard/summary returns 200 with total_invoiced=689356, total_pending=632716, total_overdue=430700, total_recovered=56640, overdue_count=2, avg_delay=30, collection_efficiency=8.2
GET /api/customers returns 5 seeded customers: ABC Traders, Shree Ganesh Manufacturing, Raj Steel Corporation, Om Packaging Solutions, Krishna Hardware Mart
GET /api/customers without Authorization header returns 401 (ownership/auth guard works)
POST /api/ai/generate-followup returns 200 with whatsapp/email_subject/email_body/call_script fields populated and _source field set
Landing page (/) renders hero with PayGuard branding, demo CTA, 0 console errors
/login: data-testid login-email-input, login-password-input, login-submit-btn work; redirects to /app/dashboard

Dashboard shows KPI cards (Total Invoiced ₹6.89 L, Pending ₹6.33 L, Overdue ₹4.31 L, Recovered ₹56.6K, High-risk 0, Avg delay 30d, Collection 8.2%, Customers 5) and charts (Pending vs Recovered, Status distribution visible)
INR formatting with ₹ and Indian style (L/K suffixes) verified on dashboard
/app/invoices lists 5 invoices with statuses Overdue, Paid, Due Today, Due Soon and risk badges
btn-logout clears session and redirects to /login
Zero console errors across landing, login, dashboard, customers, invoices, followups navigation
notes: Smoke-level coverage only. Deeper flows deferred to full testing pass: add-customer/add-invoice dialogs, add-payment + auto-flip-to-paid, AI followup generate+copy+save, cashflow tiles, reports generation, settings save, register flow, customer detail recovery timeline, search/filter combos.
